alerts.title: Tram speed restriction near Surfers Paradise North
alerts.description: Southbound and northbound trams may run up to 4 minutes late between Cavill Avenue and Cypress Avenue.

alerts.title: Route 700 temporary stop relocation near Burleigh
alerts.description: Use temporary bay signage near Burleigh Heads Centre while streetscape upgrades are underway.

alerts.title: Broadbeach South weather operations
alerts.description: Short weather-related holding events are possible at Broadbeach South interchange tonight.

alerts.title: Cultural Centre platform works

alerts.title: Northside event traffic
